creator: mi@video-collage.com
text:
The port had  a long standing problem of  using the imap
	library  bundled with  the software  instead of  the one
	installed by the imap-uw  port like, for example, tkrat2
	port is doing.

	This version also uses the latest postilion-0.9.3c.

Fix: Note, that all of the imap-related patches are simply removed:
